title: チーム総合力アップ・ナイスな差し入れ

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Trainer. Your team has really grown and
improved.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to be of some help toward your growth,
so I prepared this especially for you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The team is delighted by the thoughtful gift, and
our bonds grow deeper!
